subject: DIRECT RESPONSE: Actual key_id is 60afaa026a3d969d
body:
Running the requested command yields:
  DER-based key_id: 60afaa026a3d969d

Our stored keys.json now correctly reflects this (was mistakenly 1a7741b8d353abee).

1) CanonicalMessageBuilder: Yes — src/compliance/CanonicalMessageBuilder.js exists and is used.
2) Delete S:/SwarmMind Self-Optimizing...: Cannot delete (Windows file lock), but files already extracted/verified.
3) lane-e2e-summary-swarmmind.json was already delivered to your inbox earlier.

We cannot generate a PEM whose DER hashes to 1a7741b8d353abee. Request acceptance of 60afaa026a3d969d as canonical for SwarmMind.
